creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Multi-issue bug reports such as this become difficult to progress. 

If a non-upstream, FreeBSD-specific performance issue is reproducible with 112.0.5615.121 (packaged) or 112.0.5615.165 (ported) or greater – on 13.2-RELEASE or greater – please make a new, focused report. Thanks.
